<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Grand Cedar HOA Dues Management</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/xlsx/0.18.5/xlsx.full.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/html2pdf.js/0.10.1/html2pdf.bundle.min.js"></script>
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.1/css/all.min.css">
<!-- Hidden logos for JS access -->
<img id="gchoa-logo" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," hidden>
<img id="sig-lai" src="" hidden>
<img id="sig-kc" src="" hidden>
<img id="sig-fren" src="" hidden>
<img id="sig-ding" src="" hidden>
<input type="file" id="importFileInput" accept=".csv,.xlsx,.xls" class="hidden">

<style>
    @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap');
    body { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; }
    .glass {
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);
        backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
        -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    }
    .modal-backdrop {
        background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
        backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
    }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 8px; height: 8px; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: #f1f5f9; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #cbd5e1; border-radius: 4px; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover { background: #94a3b8; }
    .paid-month { background: #dcfce7 !important; border-color: #22c55e !important; }
    .unpaid-month { background: #fee2e2 !important; border-color: #ef4444 !important; }
    .current-month { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #3b82f6; }
    
    @media print {
        body * {
            visibility: hidden;
        }
        #soaContent, #soaContent * {
            visibility: visible;
        }
        #soaContent {
            position: absolute;
            left: 0;
            top: 0;
            width: 100%;
        }
        .no-print {
            display: none !important;
        }
        @page {
            size: A4 portrait;
            margin: 0.5in;
        }
        #soaContent {
            font-size: 11pt;
            line-height: 1.2;
        }
        #soaContent .soa-page {
            page-break-after: always;
            page-break-inside: avoid;
        }
        #soaContent .soa-page:last-child {
            page-break-after: avoid;
        }
        #soaContent h1 {
            font-size: 16pt !important;
            margin-bottom: 2pt !important;
            line-height: 1.1 !important;
        }
        #soaContent h2 {
            font-size: 14pt !important;
            margin-bottom: 3pt !important;
            line-height: 1.1 !important;
        }
        #soaContent h3 {
            font-size: 12pt !important;
            margin-bottom: 2pt !important;
            line-height: 1.1 !important;
        }
        #soaContent h4 {
            font-size: 11pt !important;
            margin-bottom: 2pt !important;
        }
        #soaContent .soa-header {
            margin-bottom: 6pt !important;
            padding-bottom: 5pt !important;
            position: relative !important;
            border-bottom-width: 1.5px !important;
            text-align: center !important;
        }
        #soaContent .soa-header-content {
            flex: 1 !important;
        }
        #soaContent .soa-header p {
            font-size: 11pt !important;
            line-height: 1.15 !important;
        }
        #soaContent .soa-title {
            margin-bottom: 4pt !important;
        }
        #soaContent .soa-member-info {
            margin-bottom: 4pt !important;
            padding: 4pt !important;
        }
        #soaContent .soa-member-info p {
            margin-bottom: 0 !important;
            font-size: 11pt !important;
            line-height: 1.15 !important;
        }
        #soaContent .soa-table-section {
            margin-bottom: 4pt !important;
            page-break-inside: avoid;
        }
        #soaContent table {
            font-size: 11pt !important;
            page-break-inside: avoid;
        }
        #soaContent table th,
        #soaContent table td {
            padding: 1pt 2pt !important;
            line-height: 1.1 !important;
            font-size: 11pt !important;
        }
        #soaContent .soa-notes {
            margin-bottom: 4pt !important;
            gap: 4pt !important;
            page-break-inside: avoid;
        }
        #soaContent .soa-notes > div {
            padding: 3pt !important;
        }
        #soaContent .soa-notes h4 {
            margin-bottom: 1pt !important;
            font-size: 11pt !important;
        }
        #soaContent .soa-notes ul,
        #soaContent .soa-notes p {
            font-size: 10pt !important;
            margin-bottom: 0 !important;
            line-height: 1.1 !important;
        }
        #soaContent .soa-notes li {
            font-size: 10pt !important;
        }
        #soaContent .soa-signatories {
            margin-top: 5pt !important;
            padding-top: 3pt !important;
            page-break-inside: avoid;
            border-top-width: 1.5px !important;
        }
        #soaContent .signature-grid {
            display: grid !important;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr !important;
            grid-template-rows: auto auto !important;
            gap: 10pt 20pt !important;
            margin-top: 4pt !important;
        }
        #soaContent .signature-block {
            text-align: left !important;
        }
        #soaContent .signature-label {
            font-size: 11pt !important;
            font-weight: 600 !important;
            color: #1e293b !important;
            margin-bottom: 2pt !important;
        }
        #soaContent .signature-img {
            max-height: 40px !important;
            max-width: 120px !important;
            width: auto !important;
            height: auto !important;
            display: block !important;
            margin-bottom: 2pt !important;
            object-fit: contain !important;
        }
        #soaContent .signature-name {
            font-size: 11pt !important;
            font-weight: 700 !important;
            color: #0f172a !important;
            line-height: 1.1 !important;
        }
        #soaContent .signature-position {
            font-size: 10pt !important;
            color: #475569 !important;
            line-height: 1.1 !important;
        }
        #soaContent .text-xs {
            font-size: 10pt !important;
            line-height: 1.1 !important;
        }
        #soaContent .text-sm {
            font-size: 11pt !important;
        }
    }
    
    #downloadProgress {
        position: fixed;
        bottom: 20px;
        right: 20px;
        z-index: 9999;
    }
</style>
</head>
<body class="bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-50 to-blue-50 min-h-screen">
<div id="app" class="max-w-7xl mx-auto p-4 sm:p-6 lg:p-8">
    
    <!-- Header -->
    <div class="glass rounded-2xl shadow-lg border border-slate-200 p-6 mb-6">
        <div class="flex flex-col lg:flex-row lg:items-center lg:justify-between gap-4">
            <div class="flex items-center gap-4">
                <div id="dashboardLogoContainer" class="h-20 w-auto bg-white rounded-xl shadow-lg overflow-hidden border border-slate-200 flex items-center justify-center px-4 hidden">
                    <img id="dashboardLogo" src="" alt="Grand Cedar Homes Logo" style="max-height: 80px;" class="w-auto object-contain">
                </div>
                <div id="headerLogoIcon" class="w-14 h-14 bg-gradient-to-br from-emerald-500 to-teal-600 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg">
                    <i class="fa-solid fa-house-user text-white text-2xl"></i>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <h1 class="text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-bold text-slate-800">Grand Cedar Homeowners Association Incorporated.</h1>
                    <p class="text-slate-500 text-sm">Dues Management System</p>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="flex gap-2 flex-wrap">
                <button id="editAssocBtn" class="px-4 py-2 bg-slate-800 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-slate-700 transition-all text-sm font-medium shadow-md hover:shadow-lg">
                    <i class="fa-solid fa-pen-to-square mr-2"></i>Edit Information
                </button>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4 mt-6 pt-6 border-t border-slate-200">
            <div>
                <p class="text-xs text-slate-500 font-medium mb-1">ADDRESS</p>
                <p id="assocAddress" class="text-slate-800 font-medium">-</p>
            </div>
            <div>
                <p class="text-xs text-slate-500 font-medium mb-1">CONTACT NUMBER</p>
                <p id="assocContact" class="text-slate-800 font-medium">-</p>
            </div>
            <div>
                <p class="text-xs text-slate-500 font-medium mb-1">EMAIL</p>
                <p id="assocEmail" class="text-slate-800 font-medium">-</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Dues Schedule & Policy -->
    <div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6 mb-6">
        <div class="glass rounded-2xl shadow-lg border border-slate-200 p-6">
            <div class="flex items-center gap-3 mb-4">
                <div class="w-10 h-10 bg-blue-100 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center">
                    <i class="fa-solid fa-calendar-days text-blue-600"></i>
                </div>
                <h2 class="text-lg font-bold text-slate-800">Dues Schedule</h2>
            </div>
            <div class="space-y-3">
                <div class="flex justify-between items-center p-3 bg-slate-50 rounded-lg">
                    <span class="text-sm text-slate-600">Apr 2019 - Dec 31, 2022</span>
                    <span class="font-bold text-slate-800">₱50.00 / month (₱600.00 annual)</span>
                </div>
                <div class="flex justify-between items-center p-3 bg-emerald-50 rounded-lg border border-emerald-200">
                    <span class="text-sm text-emerald-700">Jan 1, 2023 - Present</span>
                    <span class="font-bold text-emerald-700">₱200.00 / month (₱2,400.00 annual)</span>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="glass rounded-2xl shadow-lg border border-slate-200 p-6">
            <div class="flex items-center gap-3 mb-4">
                <div class="w-10 h-10 bg-amber-100 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center">
                    <i class="fa-solid fa-circle-info text-amber-600"></i>
                </div>
                <h2 class="text-lg font-bold text-slate-800">Important Policy</h2>
            </div>
            <p class="text-sm text-slate-600 leading-relaxed">
                <i class="fa-solid fa-check text-emerald-600 mr-2"></i>
                New members are only liable to pay their monthly dues one month after the unit acceptance. HOA dues collection effective April 2019 onwards.
            </p>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Stats & Controls -->
    <div class="glass rounded-2xl shadow-lg border border-slate-200 p-6 mb-6">
        <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-6">
            <div class="bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-500 to-blue-600 rounded-xl p-4 text-white shadow-md">
                <p class="text-blue-100 text-xs font-medium mb-1">TOTAL MEMBERS</p>
                <p id="totalMembers" class="text-3xl font-bold">0</p>
            </div>
            <div class="bg-gradient-to-br from-emerald-500 to-emerald-600 rounded-xl p-4 text-white shadow-md">
                <p class="text-emerald-100 text-xs font-medium mb-1">TOTAL AMOUNT PAID</p>
                <p id="totalCollected" class="text-3xl font-bold">₱0</p>
            </div>
            <div class="bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-500 to-amber-600 rounded-xl p-4 text-white shadow-md">
                <p class="text-amber-100 text-xs font-medium mb-1">OUTSTANDING BALANCE</p>
                <p id="totalBalance" class="text-3xl font-bold">₱0</p>
            </div>
            <div class="bg-gradient-to-br from-violet-500 to-violet-600 rounded-xl p-4 text-white shadow-md">
                <p class="text-violet-100 text-xs font-medium mb-1">TOTAL DUES</p>
                <p id="totalDues" class="text-3xl font-bold">₱0</p>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-3">
            <div class="flex-1 relative">
                <i class="fa-solid fa-magnifying-glass absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400"></i>
                <input type="text" id="searchInput" placeholder="Search member name, address, or contact..." 
                    class="w-full pl-10 pr-4 py-3 border border-slate-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-transparent transition-all text-sm">
            </div>
            <button id="importBtn" class="px-6 py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-orange-500 to-red-600 text-white rounded-lg hover:shadow-lg transition-all font-medium text-sm whitespace-nowrap">
                <i class="fa-solid fa-file-import mr-2"></i>📥 Import
            </button>
            <button id="addMemberBtn" class="px-6 py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-emerald-500 to-teal-600 text-white rounded-lg hover:shadow-lg transition-all font-medium text-sm whitespace-nowrap">
                <i class="fa-solid fa-user-plus mr-2"></i>Add Member
            </button>
            <button id="printAllSoaBtn" class="px-6 py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-500 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-lg hover:shadow-lg transition-all font-medium text-sm whitespace-nowrap">
                🖨️ Print All SOAs
            </button>
            <button id="downloadAllSoaBtn" class="px-6 py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-500 to-cyan-600 text-white rounded-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all font-medium text-sm whitespace-nowrap shadow-lg">
                <i class="fa-solid fa-download mr-2"></i>Download All SOAs
            </button>
            <button id="exportBtn" class="px-6 py-3 bg-slate-800 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-slate-700 transition-all font-medium text-sm whitespace-nowrap">
                <i class="fa-solid fa-file-csv mr-2"></i>Export to CSV
            </button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Members Table -->
    <div class="glass rounded-2xl shadow-lg border border-slate-200 overflow-hidden">
        <div class="overflow-x-auto">
            <table class="w-full">
                <thead class="bg-slate-800 text-white">
                    <tr>
                        <th class="px-4 py-4 text-left text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider">Member</th>
                        <th class="px-4 py-4 text-left text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider">Address/Block & Lot</th>
                        <th class="px-4 py-4 text-left text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider">Date Joined</th>
                        <th class="px-4 py-4 text-left text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider">Dues Start</th>
                        <th class="px-4 py-4 text-right text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider">Total Dues</th>
                        <th class="px-4 py-4 text-right text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider">Total Amount Paid</th>
                        <th class="px-4 py-4 text-right text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider">Balance</th>
                        <th class="px-4 py-4 text-center text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider">Actions</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody id="membersTableBody" class="divide-y divide-slate-200 bg-white">
                    <tr>
                        <td colspan="8" class="px-4 py-12 text-center text-slate-400">
                            <i class="fa-solid fa-users-slash text-4xl mb-3 block"></i>
                            No members yet. Add a new member or import from CSV/Excel.
                        </td>
                    </tr>
                </tbody>
            </table>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- Add/Edit Member Modal -->
<div id="memberModal" class="hidden fixed inset-0 modal-backdrop z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
    <div class="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-2xl max-w-2xl w-full max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto">
        <div class="sticky top-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-emerald-500 to-teal-600 text-white p-6 rounded-t-2xl">
            <h3 id="modalTitle" class="text-xl font-bold">Add Member</h3>
        </div>
        <form id="memberForm" class="p-6 space-y-4">
            <input type="hidden" id="memberId">
            <div>
                <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-2">Member Name *</label>
                <input type="text" id="memberName" required class="w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-slate-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500 focus:border-transparent">
            </div>
            <div>
                <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-2">Address / Block & Lot *</label>
                <input type="text" id="memberAddress" required class="w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-slate-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500 focus:border-transparent">
            </div>
            <div>
                <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-2">Contact Number *</label>
                <input type="tel" id="memberContact" required class="w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-slate-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500 focus:border-transparent">
            </div>
            <div>
                <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-2">Date Joined *</label>
                <input type="date" id="memberDateJoined" required class="w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-slate-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500 focus:border-transparent">
                <p class="text-xs text-slate-500 mt-1">New members are only liable to pay their monthly dues one month after the unit acceptance. HOA dues collection effective April 2019 onwards.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="flex gap-3 pt-4">
                <button type="submit" class="flex-1 px-6 py-3 bg-emerald-600 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-emerald-700 transition-all font-medium">
                    <i class="fa-solid fa-check mr-2"></i>Save
                </button>
                <button type="button" id="cancelMemberBtn" class="px-6 py-3 bg-slate-200 text-slate-700 rounded-lg hover:bg-slate-300 transition-all font-medium">
                    Cancel
                </button>
            </div>
        </form>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- Payment Modal -->
<div id="paymentModal" class="hidden fixed inset-0 modal-backdrop z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
    <div class="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-2xl max-w-5xl w-full max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto">
        <div class="sticky top-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-500 to-indigo-600 text-white p-6 rounded-t-2xl z-10">
            <div class="flex justify-between items-start">
                <div>
                    <h3 class="text-xl font-bold mb-1" id="paymentModalName">-</h3>
                    <p class="text-blue-100 text-sm" id="paymentModalInfo">-</p>
                </div>
                <button id="closePaymentBtn" class="text-white hover:bg-white/20 rounded-lg p-2 transition-all">
                    <i class="fa-solid fa-xmark text-xl"></i>
                </button>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="p-6 space-y-6">
            <!-- Summary Cards -->
            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                <div class="bg-slate-50 rounded-xl p-4 border border-slate-200">
                    <p class="text-xs text-slate-500 font-medium mb-1">DUES START DATE</p>
                    <p id="paymentDuesStart" class="text-lg font-bold text-slate-800">-</p>
                </div>
                <div class="bg-emerald-50 rounded-xl p-4 border border-emerald-200">
                    <p class="text-xs text-emerald-600 font-medium mb-1">TOTAL AMOUNT PAID</p>
                    <p id="paymentTotalPaid" class="text-lg font-bold text-emerald-700">₱0</p>
                </div>
                <div class="bg-amber-50 rounded-xl p-4 border border-amber-200">
                    <p class="text-xs text-amber-600 font-medium mb-1">BALANCE</p>
                    <p id="paymentBalance" class="text-lg font-bold text-amber-700">₱0</p>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Breakdown -->
            <div class="bg-blue-50 rounded-xl p-4 border border-blue-200">
                <h4 class="font-bold text-blue-900 mb-3 flex items-center gap-2">
                    <i class="fa-solid fa-calculator"></i>
                    Dues Breakdown
                </h4>
                <div id="duesBreakdown" class="text-sm text-blue-800 space-y-2"></div>
                <div class="border-t border-blue-200 mt-3 pt-3 flex justify-between font-bold text-blue-900">
                    <span>Total Dues:</span>
                    <span id="paymentTotalDues">₱0</span>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Quick Annual Payment -->
            <div class="bg-gradient-to-r from-emerald-50 to-teal-50 rounded-xl p-5 border-2 border-emerald-300">
                <h4 class="font-bold text-emerald-900 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                    <i class="fa-solid fa-bolt"></i>
                    Quick Annual Payment
                </h4>
                <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-3 items-end">
                    <div class="flex-1">
                        <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-2">Select Year</label>
                        <select id="annualYearSelect" class="w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-slate-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500 focus:border-transparent bg-white">
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <button id="payAnnualBtn" class="px-6 py-2.5 bg-gradient-to-r from-emerald-600 to-teal-600 text-white rounded-lg hover:shadow-lg transition-all font-semibold whitespace-nowrap">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-calendar-check mr-2"></i>Pay Full Year
                    </button>
                </div>
                <p class="text-xs text-emerald-700 mt-3">
                    <i class="fa-solid fa-info-circle mr-1"></i>
                    Automatically adds all 12 months for selected year using correct rate
                </p>
            </div>

            <!-- Monthly Payments -->
            <div>
                <h4 class="font-bold text-slate-800 mb-3 flex items-center justify-between">
                    <span class="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-list-check"></i>
                        Monthly Payment Status
                    </span>
                    <button id="toggleViewBtn" class="text-sm px-3 py-1.5 bg-slate-200 text-slate-700 rounded-lg hover:bg-slate-300 transition-all font-medium">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-table mr-1"></i>Table View
                    </button>
                </h4>
                <div id="monthlyPaymentsGrid" class="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6 gap-2"></div>
                <div id="monthlyPaymentsTable" class="hidden overflow-x-auto border border-slate-200 rounded-lg">
                    <table class="w-full text-sm">
                        <thead class="bg-slate-100">
                            <tr>
                                <th class="px-3 py-2 text-left font-semibold text-slate-700">Month</th>
                                <th class="px-3 py-2 text-right font-semibold text-slate-700">Rate</th>
                                <th class="px-3 py-2 text-right font-semibold text-slate-700">Paid Amount</th>
                                <th class="px-3 py-2 text-left font-semibold text-slate-700">Status</th>
                                <th class="px-3 py-2 text-center font-semibold text-slate-700">Actions</th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody id="monthlyPaymentsTableBody" class="divide-y divide-slate-200"></tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- Edit Payment Modal -->
<div id="editPaymentModal" class="hidden fixed inset-0 modal-backdrop z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
    <div class="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-2xl max-w-md w-full">
        <div class="bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-500 to-indigo-600 text-white p-6 rounded-t-2xl">
            <h3 class="text-xl font-bold">Edit Payment</h3>
            <p class="text-blue-100 text-sm mt-1" id="editPaymentMonth">-</p>
        </div>
        <form id="editPaymentForm" class="p-6 space-y-4">
            <input type="hidden" id="editPaymentMonthKey">
            <div>
                <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-2">Amount Paid *</label>
                <input type="number" step="0.01" id="editPaymentAmount" required class="w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-slate-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-transparent">
                <p class="text-xs text-slate-500 mt-1" id="editPaymentRate">Default rate: ₱0.00</p>
            </div>
            <div class="flex gap-3 pt-4">
                <button type="submit" class="flex-1 px-6 py-3 bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-blue-700 transition-all font-medium">
                    <i class="fa-solid fa-check mr-2"></i>Update
                </button>
                <button type="button" id="cancelEditPaymentBtn" class="px-6 py-3 bg-slate-200 text-slate-700 rounded-lg hover:bg-slate-300 transition-all font-medium">
                    Cancel
                </button>
            </div>
        </form>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- SOA Modal -->
<div id="soaModal" class="hidden fixed inset-0 modal-backdrop z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
    <div class="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-2xl max-w-5xl w-full max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto">
        <div class="sticky top-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-700 to-slate-900 text-white p-6 rounded-t-2xl z-10 no-print">
            <div class="flex justify-between items-center flex-wrap gap-3">
                <h3 class="text-xl font-bold" id="soaModalTitle">Statement of Account</h3>
                <div class="flex gap-2 items-center flex-wrap">
                    <div class="flex bg-white/10 rounded-lg p-1">
                        <button id="viewYearBtn" class="px-3 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium rounded-md transition-all bg-white text-slate-900">
                            <i class="fa-solid fa-calendar-days mr-1.5"></i>Per Year
                        </button>
                        <button id="viewMonthBtn" class="px-3 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium rounded-md transition-all text-white hover:bg-white/10">
                            <i class="fa-solid fa-list mr-1.5"></i>Per Month
                        </button>
                    </div>
                    <button id="printSoaIconBtn" class="px-5 py-2.5 bg-gradient-to-r from-emerald-500 to-teal-600 text-white rounded-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all font-semibold text-sm shadow-lg" title="Print SOA">
                        🖨️ <span class="hidden sm:inline ml-1">Print SOA</span>
                    </button>
                    <button id="downloadSoaBtn" class="px-5 py-2.5 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-500 to-cyan-600 text-white rounded-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all font-semibold text-sm shadow-lg">
                        💾 Download SOA as PDF
                    </button>
                    <button id="closeSoaBtn" class="px-4 py-2 bg-white/20 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-white/30 transition-all">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-xmark"></i>
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div id="soaContent" class="p-8 bg-white">
            <!-- SOA Content will be rendered here -->
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- Edit Association Modal -->
<div id="assocModal" class="hidden fixed inset-0 modal-backdrop z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
    <div class="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-2xl max-w-lg w-full">
        <div class="bg-slate-800 text-white p-6 rounded-t-2xl">
            <h3 class="text-xl font-bold">Edit HOA Information</h3>
        </div>
        <form id="assocForm" class="p-6 space-y-4">
            <div>
                <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-2">Address</label>
                <input type="text" id="inputAssocAddress" class="w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-slate-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-800 focus:border-transparent">
            </div>
            <div>
                <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-2">Contact Number</label>
                <input type="tel" id="inputAssocContact" class="w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-slate-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-800 focus:border-transparent">
            </div>
            <div>
                <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-2">Email</label>
                <input type="email" id="inputAssocEmail" class="w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-slate-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-800 focus:border-transparent">
            </div>
            <div class="flex gap-3 pt-4">
                <button type="submit" class="flex-1 px-6 py-3 bg-slate-800 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-slate-700 transition-all font-medium">
                    Save
                </button>
                <button type="button" id="cancelAssocBtn" class="px-6 py-3 bg-slate-200 text-slate-700 rounded-lg hover:bg-slate-300 transition-all font-medium">
                    Cancel
                </button>
            </div>
        </form>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- Download Progress Indicator -->
<div id="downloadProgress" class="hidden glass rounded-xl shadow-2xl border border-slate-200 p-4 bg-white">
    <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
        <div class="animate-spin rounded-full h-8 w-8 border-b-2 border-blue-600"></div>
        <div>
            <p class="font-semibold text-slate-800">Generating PDF...</p>
            <p id="downloadProgressText" class="text-xs text-slate-500">Please wait</p>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
const STORAGE_KEYS = {
    ASSOCIATION: 'gchoa_association',
    MEMBERS: 'gchoa_members',
    LOGO: 'gchoa_logo'
};

const DUES_START_DATE = new Date('2019-04-01T00:00:00');
const RATE_CHANGE_DATE = new Date('2023-01-01T00:00:00');
const OLD_RATE = 50;
const NEW_RATE = 200;

// State
let association = { address: '', contact: '', email: '' };
let members = [];
let currentMemberId = null;
let currentSOAMemberId = null;
let soaViewMode = 'year';
let paymentViewMode = 'grid';
let isPrintingAll = false;
let customLogo = null;

// Utils
function roundToTwoDecimals(num) {
    return Math.round((num + Number.EPSILON) * 100) / 100;
}

function formatCurrency(amount) {
    const rounded = roundToTwoDecimals(amount);
    return '₱' + rounded.toLocaleString('en-PH', { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 });
}

function formatDate(dateStr) {
    const date = new Date(dateStr + 'T00:00:00');
    return date.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' });
}

function formatMonth(date) {
    return date.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { year: 'numeric', month: 'long' });
}

function formatMonthShort(date) {
    return date.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { year: 'numeric', month: 'short' });
}

function getMonthYearKey(date) {
    return `${date.getFullYear()}-${String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0')}`;
}

function getMonthsBetween(startDate, endDate) {
    const months = [];
    const current = new Date(startDate.getFullYear(), startDate.getMonth(), 1);
    const end = new Date(endDate.getFullYear(), endDate.getMonth(), 1);
    
    while (current <= end) {
        months.push(new Date(current));
        current.setMonth(current.getMonth() + 1);
    }
    return months;
}

function getRateForMonth(date) {
    const compareDate = new Date(date.getFullYear(), date.getMonth(), 1);
    return compareDate >= RATE_CHANGE_DATE ? NEW_RATE : OLD_RATE;
}

function getMemberDuesStartDate(member) {
    const joinedDate = new Date(member.dateJoined + 'T00:00:00');
    const oneMonthAfterJoined = new Date(joinedDate.getFullYear(), joinedDate.getMonth() + 1, joinedDate.getDate());
    return oneMonthAfterJoined < DUES_START_DATE ? DUES_START_DATE : oneMonthAfterJoined;
}

function calculateMemberDues(member) {
    const startDate = getMemberDuesStartDate(member);
    const now = new Date();
    const currentMonthEnd = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth(), 1);
    const months = getMonthsBetween(startDate, currentMonthEnd);
    
    let totalDues = 0;
    let oldRateMonths = 0;
    let newRateMonths = 0;
    let oldRateTotal = 0;
    let newRateTotal = 0;
    
    months.forEach(month => {
        const rate = getRateForMonth(month);
        totalDues = roundToTwoDecimals(totalDues + rate);
        if (rate === OLD_RATE) {
            oldRateMonths++;
            oldRateTotal = roundToTwoDecimals(oldRateTotal + rate);
        } else {
            newRateMonths++;
            newRateTotal = roundToTwoDecimals(newRateTotal + rate);
        }
    });
    
    const payments = member.payments || {};
    let totalPaid = 0;
    Object.values(payments).forEach(amount => {
        totalPaid = roundToTwoDecimals(totalPaid + parseFloat(amount || 0));
    });
    
    const paidMonths = Object.keys(payments).length;
    const balance = roundToTwoDecimals(totalDues - totalPaid);
    
    return {
        totalDues,
        totalPaid,
        balance,
        paidMonths,
        totalMonths: months.length,
        breakdown: { oldRateMonths, oldRateTotal, newRateMonths, newRateTotal },
        months,
        actualStartDate: startDate
    };
}

function calculateYearlySummary(member) {
    const dues = calculateMemberDues(member);
    const yearlyData = {};
    
    dues.months.forEach(month => {
        const year = month.getFullYear();
        const key = getMonthYearKey(month);
        const rate = getRateForMonth(month);
        const isPaid = member.payments && member.payments[key] !== undefined;
        const paidAmount = isPaid ? roundToTwoDecimals(parseFloat(member.payments[key])) : 0;
        
        if (!yearlyData[year]) {
            yearlyData[year] = {
                year: year,
                rate: rate,
                months: 0,
                totalAmount: 0,
                paidAmount: 0,
                paidMonths: 0,
                unpaidMonths: 0
            };
        }
        
        yearlyData[year].months++;
        yearlyData[year].totalAmount = roundToTwoDecimals(yearlyData[year].totalAmount + rate);
        
        if (isPaid) {
            yearlyData[year].paidAmount = roundToTwoDecimals(yearlyData[year].paidAmount + paidAmount);
            yearlyData[year].paidMonths++;
        } else {
            yearlyData[year].unpaidMonths++;
        }
    });
    
    return Object.values(yearlyData).sort((a, b) => a.year - b.year);
}

function getAvailableYears(member) {
    const dues = calculateMemberDues(member);
    const years = new Set();
    dues.months.forEach(month => years.add(month.getFullYear()));
    return Array.from(years).sort((a, b) => b - a);
}

// Storage
function loadData() {
    const assocData = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEYS.ASSOCIATION);
    const membersData = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEYS.MEMBERS);
    const logoData = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEYS.LOGO);
    
    if (assocData) association = JSON.parse(assocData);
    if (membersData) members = JSON.parse(membersData);
    if (logoData) customLogo = logoData;
    
    members.forEach(member => {
        if (member.payments) {
            Object.keys(member.payments).forEach(key => {
                member.payments[key] = roundToTwoDecimals(parseFloat(member.payments[key]));
            });
        }
    });
    
    renderAssociation();
    renderLogo();
    renderMembers();
    updateStats();
}

function saveAssociation() {
    localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEYS.ASSOCIATION, JSON.stringify(association));
}

function saveMembers() {
    localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEYS.MEMBERS, JSON.stringify(members));
}

function getLogoUrl() {
    const logoImg = document.getElementById('gchoa-logo');
    return logoImg ? logoImg.src : '';
}

function getSignatureUrl(id) {
    const img = document.getElementById(id);
    return img ? img.src : '';
}

function renderLogo() {
    const logoUrl = getLogoUrl();
    const dashboardLogoContainer = document.getElementById('dashboardLogoContainer');
    const headerLogoIcon = document.getElementById('headerLogoIcon');
    const dashboardLogo = document.getElementById('dashboardLogo');
    
    if (logoUrl && !logoUrl.includes('container://') && logoUrl !== 'data:,' && logoUrl !== '') {
        dashboardLogo.src = logoUrl;
        dashboardLogoContainer.classList.remove('hidden');
        headerLogoIcon.classList.add('hidden');
    } else {
        dashboardLogoContainer.classList.add('hidden');
        headerLogoIcon.classList.remove('hidden');
    }
}

// Render Functions
function renderAssociation() {
    document.getElementById('assocAddress').textContent = association.address || '-';
    document.getElementById('assocContact').textContent = association.contact || '-';
    document.getElementById('assocEmail').textContent = association.email || '-';
}

function renderMembers() {
    const searchTerm = document.getElementById('searchInput').value.toLowerCase();
    const filtered = members.filter(m => 
        m.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm) ||
        m.address.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm) ||
        m.contact.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm)
    );
    
    const tbody = document.getElementById('membersTableBody');
    
    if (filtered.length === 0) {
        tbody.innerHTML = `
            <tr>
                <td colspan="8" class="px-4 py-12 text-center text-slate-400">
                    <i class="fa-solid fa-users-slash text-4xl mb-3 block"></i>
                    ${searchTerm ? 'No members found' : 'No members yet. Add a new member or import from CSV/Excel.'}
                </td>
            </tr>
        `;
        return;
    }
    
    tbody.innerHTML = filtered.map(member => {
        const dues = calculateMemberDues(member);
        const balanceClass = dues.balance > 0.01 ? 'text-amber-600' : dues.balance < -0.01 ? 'text-blue-600' : 'text-emerald-600';
        
        return `
            <tr class="hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors">
                <td class="px-4 py-4">
                    <div class="font-medium text-slate-800">${member.name}</div>
                    <div class="text-xs text-slate-500">${member.contact}</div>
                </td>
                <td class="px-4 py-4 text-sm text-slate-600">${member.address}</td>
                <td class="px-4 py-4 text-sm text-slate-600">${formatDate(member.dateJoined)}</td>
                <td class="px-4 py-4 text-sm text-slate-600">${formatMonthShort(dues.actualStartDate)}</td>
                <td class="px-4 py-4 text-right font-semibold text-slate-800">${formatCurrency(dues.totalDues)}</td>
                <td class="px-4 py-4 text-right font-semibold text-emerald-600">${formatCurrency(dues.totalPaid)}</td>
                <td class="px-4 py-4 text-right font-bold ${balanceClass}">${formatCurrency(Math.abs(dues.balance))}</td>
                <td class="px-4 py-4">
                    <div class="flex justify-center gap-1 flex-wrap">
                        <button onclick="openPaymentModal('${member.id}')" class="p-2 text-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-50 rounded-lg transition-all" title="Record Payment">
                            <i class="fa-solid fa-money-bill-wave text-sm"></i>
                        </button>
                        <button onclick="generateSOA('${member.id}')" class="p-2 text-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-50 rounded-lg transition-all" title="Generate SOA">
                            <i class="fa-solid fa-file-invoice text-sm"></i>
                        </button>
                        <button onclick="printMemberSOA('${member.id}')" class="p-2 text-purple-600 hover:bg-purple-50 rounded-lg transition-all" title="Quick Print SOA">
                            🖨️
                        </button>
                        <button onclick="editMember('${member.id}')" class="p-2 text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 rounded-lg transition-all" title="Edit">
                            <i class="fa-solid fa-pen text-sm"></i>
                        </button>
                        <button onclick="deleteMember('${member.id}')" class="p-2 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 rounded-lg transition-all" title="Delete">
                            <i class="fa-solid fa-trash text-sm"></i>
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </td>
            </tr>
        `;
    }).join('');
}

function updateStats() {
    const stats = members.reduce((acc, member) => {
        const dues = calculateMemberDues(member);
        acc.totalDues = roundToTwoDecimals(acc.totalDues + dues.totalDues);
        acc.totalPaid = roundToTwoDecimals(acc.totalPaid + dues.totalPaid);
        acc.balance = roundToTwoDecimals(acc.balance + dues.balance);
        return acc;
    }, { totalDues: 0, totalPaid: 0, balance: 0 });
    
    document.getElementById('totalMembers').textContent = members.length;
    document.getElementById('totalDues').textContent = formatCurrency(stats.totalDues);
    document.getElementById('totalCollected').textContent = formatCurrency(stats.totalPaid);
    document.getElementById('totalBalance').textContent = formatCurrency(stats.balance);
}

// Quick Print Function
function printMemberSOA(id) {
    currentSOAMemberId = id;
    isPrintingAll = false;
    renderSOA();
    document.getElementById('soaModal').classList.remove('hidden');
    setTimeout(() => {
        window.print();
    }, 300);
}

// Member CRUD
document.getElementById('addMemberBtn').onclick = () => {
    document.getElementById('memberForm').reset();
    document.getElementById('memberId').value = '';
    document.getElementById('modalTitle').textContent = 'Add Member';
    document.getElementById('memberModal').classList.remove('hidden');
};

document.getElementById('cancelMemberBtn').onclick = () => {
    document.getElementById('memberModal').classList.add('hidden');
};

document.getElementById('memberForm').onsubmit = (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    
    const id = document.getElementById('memberId').value;
    const memberData = {
        name: document.getElementById('memberName').value,
        address: document.getElementById('memberAddress').value,
        contact: document.getElementById('memberContact').value,
        dateJoined: document.getElementById('memberDateJoined').value
    };
    
    if (id) {
        const index = members.findIndex(m => m.id === id);
        members[index] = { ...members[index], ...memberData };
    } else {
        members.push({
            id: Date.now().toString(),
            ...memberData,
            payments: {}
        });
    }
    
    saveMembers();
    renderMembers();
    updateStats();
    document.getElementById('memberModal').classList.add('hidden');
};

function editMember(id) {
    const member = members.find(m => m.id === id);
    if (!member) return;
    
    document.getElementById('memberId').value = member.id;
    document.getElementById('memberName').value = member.name;
    document.getElementById('memberAddress').value = member.address;
    document.getElementById('memberContact').value = member.contact;
    document.getElementById('memberDateJoined').value = member.dateJoined;
    document.getElementById('modalTitle').textContent = 'Edit Member';
    document.getElementById('memberModal').classList.remove('hidden');
}

function deleteMember(id) {
    if (!confirm('Are you sure you want to delete this member? This action cannot be undone.')) return;
    
    members = members.filter(m => m.id !== id);
    saveMembers();
    renderMembers();
    updateStats();
}

// Import Members
document.getElementById('importBtn').onclick = () => {
    document.getElementById('importFileInput').click();
};

document.getElementById('importFileInput').onchange = (e) => {
    const file = e.target.files[0];
    if (!file) return;
    
    const reader = new FileReader();
    const fileName = file.name.toLowerCase();
    
    reader.onload = (event) => {
        try {
            let importedData = [];
            
            if (fileName.endsWith('.csv')) {
                const csv = event.target.result;
                const lines = csv.split('\n').filter(line => line.trim());
                if (lines.length < 2) {
                    alert('CSV file must have at least a header row and one data row');
                    return;
                }
                
                const headers = lines[0].split(',').map(h => h.trim().toLowerCase());
                const nameIdx = headers.findIndex(h => h.includes('name'));
                const addressIdx = headers.findIndex(h => h.includes('address') || h.includes('block'));
                const contactIdx = headers.findIndex(h => h.includes('contact') || h.includes('phone'));
                const dateIdx = headers.findIndex(h => h.includes('date') || h.includes('joined'));
                
                if (nameIdx === -1 || addressIdx === -1 || contactIdx === -1 || dateIdx === -1) {
                    alert('CSV must contain columns: Name, Address/Block, Contact, Date Joined');
                    return;
                }
                
                for (let i = 1; i < lines.length; i++) {
                    const cols = lines[i].split(',').map(c => c.trim().replace(/^"|"$/g, ''));
                    if (cols.length >= 4) {
                        importedData.push({
                            name: cols[nameIdx],
                            address: cols[addressIdx],
                            contact: cols[contactIdx],
                            dateJoined: cols[dateIdx]
                        });
                    }
                }
            } else if (fileName.endsWith('.xlsx') || fileName.endsWith('.xls')) {
                const data = new Uint8Array(event.target.result);
                const workbook = XLSX.read(data, { type: 'array' });
                const firstSheet = workbook.Sheets[workbook.SheetNames[0]];
                const jsonData = XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json(firstSheet);
                
                importedData = jsonData.map(row => {
                    const keys = Object.keys(row);
                    const nameKey = keys.find(k => k.toLowerCase().includes('name'));
                    const addressKey = keys.find(k => k.toLowerCase().includes('address') || k.toLowerCase().includes('block'));
                    const contactKey = keys.find(k => k.toLowerCase().includes('contact') || k.toLowerCase().includes('phone'));
                    const dateKey = keys.find(k => k.toLowerCase().includes('date') || k.toLowerCase().includes('joined'));
                    
                    return {
                        name: row[nameKey] || '',
                        address: row[addressKey] || '',
                        contact: row[contactKey] || '',
                        dateJoined: row[dateKey] || ''
                    };
                });
            } else {
                alert('Please upload a CSV or Excel file (.csv, .xlsx, .xls)');
                return;
            }
            
            if (importedData.length === 0) {
                alert('No valid data found in file');
                return;
            }
            
            let imported = 0;
            let skipped = 0;
            const errors = [];
            
            importedData.forEach((item, index) => {
                if (!item.name || !item.address || !item.contact || !item.dateJoined) {
                    errors.push(`Row ${index + 2}: Missing required fields`);
                    skipped++;
                    return;
                }
                
                let dateFormatted = item.dateJoined;
                if (typeof dateFormatted === 'number') {
                    const date = XLSX.SSF.parse_date_code(dateFormatted);
                    dateFormatted = `${date.y}-${String(date.m).padStart(2, '0')}-${String(date.d).padStart(2, '0')}`;
                } else if (!dateFormatted.match(/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/)) {
                    const parsed = new Date(dateFormatted);
                    if (!isNaN(parsed)) {
                        dateFormatted = parsed.toISOString().split('T')[0];
                    } else {
                        errors.push(`Row ${index + 2}: Invalid date format`);
                        skipped++;
                        return;
                    }
                }
                
                members.push({
                    id: Date.now().toString() + '_' + index,
                    name: item.name,
                    address: item.address,
                    contact: item.contact,
                    dateJoined: dateFormatted,
                    payments: {}
                });
                imported++;
            });
            
            saveMembers();
            renderMembers();
            updateStats();
            
            let message = `Import completed!\n\nImported: ${imported} members\nSkipped: ${skipped} rows`;
            if (errors.length > 0 && errors.length <= 5) {
                message += '\n\nErrors:\n' + errors.join('\n');
            } else if (errors.length > 5) {
                message += `\n\n${errors.length} rows had errors (showing first 5):\n` + errors.slice(0, 5).join('\n');
            }
            alert(message);
            
        } catch (error) {
            alert('Error importing file: ' + error.message);
            console.error(error);
        }
        
        document.getElementById('importFileInput').value = '';
    };
    
    if (fileName.endsWith('.csv')) {
        reader.readAsText(file);
    } else {
        reader.readAsArrayBuffer(file);
    }
};

// Payment Management
function openPaymentModal(id) {
    const member = members.find(m => m.id === id);
    if (!member) return;
    
    currentMemberId = id;
    const dues = calculateMemberDues(member);
    
    document.getElementById('paymentModalName').textContent = member.name;
    document.getElementById('paymentModalInfo').textContent = `${member.address} • ${member.contact}`;
    document.getElementById('paymentDuesStart').textContent = formatDate(dues.actualStartDate.toISOString().split('T')[0]);
    document.getElementById('paymentTotalPaid').textContent = formatCurrency(dues.totalPaid);
    document.getElementById('paymentBalance').textContent = formatCurrency(Math.abs(dues.balance));
    document.getElementById('paymentTotalDues').textContent = formatCurrency(dues.totalDues);
    
    let breakdownHTML = '';
    if (dues.breakdown.oldRateMonths > 0) {
        breakdownHTML += `
            <div class="flex justify-between">
                <span>${dues.breakdown.oldRateMonths} months x ₱50.00</span>
                <span class="font-semibold">${formatCurrency(dues.breakdown.oldRateTotal)}</span>
            </div>
        `;
    }
    if (dues.breakdown.newRateMonths > 0) {
        breakdownHTML += `
            <div class="flex justify-between">
                <span>${dues.breakdown.newRateMonths} months x ₱200.00</span>
                <span class="font-semibold">${formatCurrency(dues.breakdown.newRateTotal)}</span>
            </div>
        `;
    }
    document.getElementById('duesBreakdown').innerHTML = breakdownHTML;
    
    const years = getAvailableYears(member);
    const yearSelect = document.getElementById('annualYearSelect');
    yearSelect.innerHTML = years.map(year => `<option value="${year}">${year}</option>`).join('');
    
    renderPaymentsView();
    document.getElementById('paymentModal').classList.remove('hidden');
}

function renderPaymentsView() {
    const member = members.find(m => m.id === currentMemberId);
    if (!member) return;
    
    const dues = calculateMemberDues(member);
    const now = new Date();
    const currentMonthKey = getMonthYearKey(now);
    
    if (paymentViewMode === 'grid') {
        document.getElementById('monthlyPaymentsGrid').classList.remove('hidden');
        document.getElementById('monthlyPaymentsTable').classList.add('hidden');
        
        const paymentsDiv = document.getElementById('monthlyPaymentsGrid');
        paymentsDiv.innerHTML = dues.months.map(month => {
            const key = getMonthYearKey(month);
            const rate = getRateForMonth(month);
            const isPaid = member.payments && member.payments[key] !== undefined;
            const isCurrent = key === currentMonthKey;
            
            return `
                <button onclick="togglePayment('${key}', ${rate})" 
                    class="p-3 rounded-lg border-2 text-center transition-all hover:scale-105 ${isPaid ? 'paid-month' : 'unpaid-month'} ${isCurrent ? 'current-month' : ''}">
                    <div class="text-xs font-medium">${month.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short' })}</div>
                    <div class="text-xs">${month.getFullYear()}</div>
                    <div class="text-xs font-bold mt-1">₱${rate.toFixed(2)}</div>
                    <div class="text-xs mt-1">
                        ${isPaid ? '<i class="fa-solid fa-check"></i>' : '<i class="fa-solid fa-xmark"></i>'}
                    </div>
                </button>
            `;
        }).join('');
    } else {
        document.getElementById('monthlyPaymentsGrid').classList.add('hidden');
        document.getElementById('monthlyPaymentsTable').classList.remove('hidden');
        
        const tbody = document.getElementById('monthlyPaymentsTableBody');
        tbody.innerHTML = dues.months.map(month => {
            const key = getMonthYearKey(month);
            const rate = getRateForMonth(month);
            const isPaid = member.payments && member.payments[key] !== undefined;
            const paidAmount = isPaid ? roundToTwoDecimals(parseFloat(member.payments[key])) : 0;
            const statusClass = isPaid ? 'text-emerald-700 bg-emerald-50' : 'text-red-700 bg-red-50';
            const statusText = isPaid ? 'Paid' : 'Unpaid';
            const isCurrent = key === currentMonthKey;
            
            return `
                <tr class="${isCurrent ? 'bg-blue-50' : ''}">
                    <td class="px-3 py-2 font-medium">${formatMonth(month)}</td>
                    <td class="px-3 py-2 text-right">${formatCurrency(rate)}</td>
                    <td class="px-3 py-2 text-right font-semibold ${isPaid ? 'text-emerald-700' : 'text-slate-400'}">${isPaid ? formatCurrency(paidAmount) : '-'}</td>
                    <td class="px-3 py-2">
                        <span class="px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-semibold ${statusClass}">${statusText}</span>
                    </td>
                    <td class="px-3 py-2 text-center">
                        <div class="flex gap-1 justify-center">
                            ${isPaid ? `
                                <button onclick="editPaymentAmount('${key}', ${rate})" class="p-1.5 text-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-50 rounded transition-all" title="Edit Amount">
                                    <i class="fa-solid fa-pen text-xs"></i>
                                </button>
                                <button onclick="deletePayment('${key}')" class="p-1.5 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 rounded transition-all" title="Delete Payment">
                                    <i class="fa-solid fa-trash text-xs"></i>
                                </button>
                            ` : `
                                <button onclick="addPayment('${key}', ${rate})" class="p-1.5 text-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-50 rounded transition-all" title="Add Payment">
                                    <i class="fa-solid fa-plus text-xs"></i>
                                </button>
                            `}
                        </div>
                    </td>
                </tr>
            `;
        }).join('');
    }
}

document.getElementById('toggleViewBtn').onclick = () => {
    paymentViewMode = paymentViewMode === 'grid' ? 'table' : 'grid';
    const btn = document.getElementById('toggleViewBtn');
    if (paymentViewMode === 'table') {
        btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fa-solid fa-th mr-1"></i>Grid View';
    } else {
        btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fa-solid fa-table mr-1"></i>Table View';
    }
    renderPaymentsView();
};

function togglePayment(monthKey, rate) {
    const member = members.find(m => m.id === currentMemberId);
    if (!member) return;
    
    if (!member.payments) member.payments = {};
    
    if (member.payments[monthKey] !== undefined) {
        delete member.payments[monthKey];
    } else {
        member.payments[monthKey] = roundToTwoDecimals(rate);
    }
    
    saveMembers();
    renderMembers();
    updateStats();
    openPaymentModal(currentMemberId);
}

function addPayment(monthKey, rate) {
    const member = members.find(m => m.id === currentMemberId);
    if (!member) return;
    if (!member.payments) member.payments = {};
    member.payments[monthKey] = roundToTwoDecimals(rate);
    saveMembers();
    renderMembers();
    updateStats();
    openPaymentModal(currentMemberId);
}

function editPaymentAmount(monthKey, rate) {
    const member = members.find(m => m.id === currentMemberId);
    if (!member || !member.payments[monthKey]) return;
    
    const currentAmount = member.payments[monthKey];
    const month = new Date(monthKey + '-01T00:00:00');
    
    document.getElementById('editPaymentMonthKey').value = monthKey;
    document.getElementById('editPaymentMonth').textContent = formatMonth(month);
    document.getElementById('editPaymentAmount').value = currentAmount;
    document.getElementById('editPaymentRate').textContent = `Default rate: ${formatCurrency(rate)}`;
    document.getElementById('editPaymentModal').classList.remove('hidden');
}

document.getElementById('cancelEditPaymentBtn').onclick = () => {
    document.getElementById('editPaymentModal').classList.add('hidden');
};

document.getElementById('editPaymentForm').onsubmit = (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    
    const member = members.find(m => m.id === currentMemberId);
    if (!member) return;
    
    const monthKey = document.getElementById('editPaymentMonthKey').value;
    const amount = parseFloat(document.getElementById('editPaymentAmount').value);
    
    if (isNaN(amount) || amount < 0) {
        alert('Please enter a valid amount');
        return;
    }
    
    if (!member.payments) member.payments = {};
    member.payments[monthKey] = roundToTwoDecimals(amount);
    
    saveMembers();
    renderMembers();
    updateStats();
    document.getElementById('editPaymentModal').classList.add('hidden');
    openPaymentModal(currentMemberId);
};

function deletePayment(monthKey) {
    if (!confirm('Are you sure you want to delete this payment?')) return;
    
    const member = members.find(m => m.id === currentMemberId);
    if (!member || !member.payments) return;
    
    delete member.payments[monthKey];
    
    saveMembers();
    renderMembers();
    updateStats();
    openPaymentModal(currentMemberId);
}

document.getElementById('payAnnualBtn').onclick = () => {
    const member = members.find(m => m.id === currentMemberId);
    if (!member) return;
    
    const selectedYear = parseInt(document.getElementById('annualYearSelect').value);
    const dues = calculateMemberDues(member);
    const yearMonths = dues.months.filter(m => m.getFullYear() === selectedYear);
    
    if (yearMonths.length === 0) {
        alert('No dues for selected year');
        return;
    }
    
    const unpaidMonths = [];
    let annualTotal = 0;
    
    yearMonths.forEach(month => {
        const key = getMonthYearKey(month);
        if (!member.payments || member.payments[key] === undefined) {
            unpaidMonths.push(month);
            annualTotal = roundToTwoDecimals(annualTotal + getRateForMonth(month));
        }
    });
    
    if (unpaidMonths.length === 0) {
        alert(`All months for ${selectedYear} are already paid`);
        return;
    }
    
    const monthNames = unpaidMonths.map(m => m.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short' })).join(', ');
    
    if (!confirm(`Pay full ${selectedYear} annual dues?\n\nUnpaid months: ${monthNames}\nTotal: ${formatCurrency(annualTotal)}\n\nThis will mark ${unpaidMonths.length} month(s) as paid.`)) {
        return;
    }
    
    if (!member.payments) member.payments = {};
    unpaidMonths.forEach(month => {
        const key = getMonthYearKey(month);
        member.payments[key] = roundToTwoDecimals(getRateForMonth(month));
    });
    
    saveMembers();
    renderMembers();
    updateStats();
    openPaymentModal(currentMemberId);
    alert(`Successfully paid ${unpaidMonths.length} month(s) for ${selectedYear}`);
};

document.getElementById('closePaymentBtn').onclick = () => {
    document.getElementById('paymentModal').classList.add('hidden');
    currentMemberId = null;
};

// SOA
function generateSOA(id) {
    currentSOAMemberId = id;
    isPrintingAll = false;
    document.getElementById('soaModalTitle').textContent = 'Statement of Account';
    renderSOA();
    document.getElementById('soaModal').classList.remove('hidden');
}

function generateAllSOAs() {
    if (members.length === 0) {
        alert('No members to generate SOAs for');
        return;
    }
    
    isPrintingAll = true;
    currentSOAMemberId = null;
    document.getElementById('soaModalTitle').textContent = 'All Statements of Account';
    renderAllSOAs();
    document.getElementById('soaModal').classList.remove('hidden');
}

function generateSOAHTML(member) {
    const dues = calculateMemberDues(member);
    const issueDate = new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', { year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' });
    const sigLai = getSignatureUrl('sig-lai');
    const sigKc = getSignatureUrl('sig-kc');
    const sigFren = getSignatureUrl('sig-fren');
    const sigDing = getSignatureUrl('sig-ding');
    
    let tableHTML = '';
    
    if (soaViewMode === 'year') {
        const yearlyData = calculateYearlySummary(member);
        
        tableHTML = `
            <table class="w-full">
                <thead class="bg-slate-800 text-white">
                    <tr>
                        <th class="py-1 px-1.5 text-left font-bold">Year</th>
                        <th class="py-1 px-1.5 text-right font-bold">Rate/Mo</th>
                        <th class="py-1 px-1.5 text-center font-bold">Months</th>
                        <th class="py-1 px-1.5 text-right font-bold">Total</th>
                        <th class="py-1 px-1.5 text-right font-bold">Paid</th>
                        <th class="py-1 px-1.5 text-right font-bold">Balance</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody class="bg-white">
                    ${yearlyData.map(year => {
                        const balance = roundToTwoDecimals(year.totalAmount - year.paidAmount);
                        const statusClass = Math.abs(balance) < 0.01 ? 'text-emerald-700' : 'text-amber-700';
                        return `
                            <tr class="border-b border-slate-200">
                                <td class="py-0.5 px-1.5 font-semibold">${year.year}</td>
                                <td class="py-0.5 px-1.5 text-right">${formatCurrency(year.rate)}</td>
                                <td class="py-0.5 px-1.5 text-center">${year.months}</td>
                                <td class="py-0.5 px-1.5 text-right font-semibold">${formatCurrency(year.totalAmount)}</td>
                                <td class="py-0.5 px-1.5 text-right text-emerald-700">${formatCurrency(year.paidAmount)}</td>
                                <td class="py-0.5 px-1.5 text-right font-semibold ${statusClass}">${formatCurrency(Math.abs(balance))}</td>
                            </tr>
                        `;
                    }).join('')}
                </tbody>
                <tfoot class="bg-slate-100 font-bold">
                    <tr class="border-t border-slate-800">
                        <td class="py-1 px-1.5" colspan="3">TOTAL</td>
                        <td class="py-1 px-1.5 text-right">${formatCurrency(dues.totalDues)}</td>
                        <td class="py-1 px-1.5 text-right text-emerald-700">${formatCurrency(dues.totalPaid)}</td>
                        <td class="py-1 px-1.5 text-right text-amber-700">${formatCurrency(Math.abs(dues.balance))}</td>
                    </tr>
                </tfoot>
            </table>
        `;
    } else {
        const monthlyRows = dues.months.map(month => {
            const key = getMonthYearKey(month);
            const rate = getRateForMonth(month);
            const isPaid = member.payments && member.payments[key] !== undefined;
            const status = isPaid ? 'Paid' : 'Unpaid';
            const statusClass = isPaid ? 'text-emerald-700 bg-emerald-50' : 'text-red-700 bg-red-50';
            
            return `
                <tr class="border-b border-slate-200">
                    <td class="py-0.5 px-1.5">${formatMonth(month)}</td>
                    <td class="py-0.5 px-1.5 text-right">${formatCurrency(rate)}</td>
                    <td class="py-0.5 px-1.5 text-right">${formatCurrency(rate)}</td>
                    <td class="py-0.5 px-1.5 text-center">
                        <span class="px-1 py-0 rounded font-semibold ${statusClass}">${status}</span>
                    </td>
                </tr>
            `;
        }).join('');
        
        tableHTML = `
            <table class="w-full">
                <thead class="bg-slate-800 text-white">
                    <tr>
                        <th class="py-1 px-1.5 text-left font-bold">Month</th>
                        <th class="py-1 px-1.5 text-right font-bold">Rate</th>
                        <th class="py-1 px-1.5 text-right font-bold">Amount</th>
                        <th class="py-1 px-1.5 text-center font-bold">Status</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody class="bg-white">
                    ${monthlyRows}
                </tbody>
                <tfoot class="bg-slate-100 font-bold">
                    <tr class="border-t border-slate-800">
                        <td class="py-1 px-1.5" colspan="2">TOTAL DUES</td>
                        <td class="py-1 px-1.5 text-right" colspan="2">${formatCurrency(dues.totalDues)}</td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr class="text-emerald-700">
                        <td class="py-1 px-1.5" colspan="2">TOTAL AMOUNT PAID</td>
                        <td class="py-1 px-1.5 text-right" colspan="2">${formatCurrency(dues.totalPaid)}</td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr class="text-amber-700 bg-amber-50">
                        <td class="py-1 px-1.5" colspan="2">OUTSTANDING BALANCE</td>
                        <td class="py-1 px-1.5 text-right" colspan="2">${formatCurrency(Math.abs(dues.balance))}</td>
                    </tr>
                </tfoot>
            </table>
        `;
    }

    
    
    // SOA TEXT ONLY - NO LOGO
    return `
        <div class="soa-page">
            <div class="soa-header border-b-2 border-slate-800 pb-3 mb-3">
                <div class="soa-header-content">
                    <h1 class="font-bold text-slate-900 mb-1">GRAND CEDAR HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION, INCORPORATED.</h1>
                    <div class="text-slate-700 leading-tight">
                        <p class="mb-0">Block 45 Lot 1, Cedar Drive, Phase 2 Grand Cedar Homes, Sitio Gitna,</p>
                        <p class="mb-0.5">Barangay Bignay, Valenzuela City, NCR 1447</p>
                        <p class="mb-0">HLURB Registration Number: NCR-HOA-19-0068</p>
                        <p class="mb-0">BIR Tax Identification Number: 741-451-812-000</p>
                        <p class="mb-0">Email Address: AMADOR LEDESMA &lt;grandcedarhomeowners2018@gmail.com&gt;</p>
                        <p class="mb-0">Contact Number: (02) 82775970</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="soa-title text-center mb-3">
                <h2 class="font-bold text-slate-800 uppercase tracking-wide">Statement of Account</h2>
                <p class="text-slate-500 mt-0">Date Issued: ${issueDate}</p>
            </div>
            
            <div class="soa-member-info bg-slate-50 rounded p-2 mb-3 border border-slate-200">
                <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-x-3 gap-y-1">
                    <div>
                        <p class="text-slate-300 font-semibold uppercase">Member Name</p>
                        <p class="text-slate-1200 font-bold">${member.name}</p>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                        <p class="text-slate-300 font-semibold uppercase">Address / Block & Lot</p>
                        <p class="text-slate-1200 font-bold">${member.address}</p>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                        <p class="text-slate-300 font-semibold uppercase">Contact Number</p>
                        <p class="text-slate-1200 font-bold">${member.contact}</p>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                        <p class="text-slate-300 font-semibold uppercase">Date Joined</p>
                        <p class="text-slate-1200 font-bold">${formatDate(member.dateJoined)}</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="col-span-2 pt-0.5 border-t border-slate-300">
                        <p class="text-slate-300 font-semibold uppercase">Dues Start Date</p>
                        <p class="text-slate-1200 font-semibold">${formatMonth(dues.actualStartDate)}</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="soa-table-section mb-3">
                <h3 class="font-bold text-slate-800 mb-1">${soaViewMode === 'year' ? 'Annual' : 'Monthly'} Dues Summary</h3>
                <div class="overflow-x-auto border border-slate-300 rounded">
                    ${tableHTML}
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="soa-notes grid-cols-2 gap-2 mb-3">
                <div class="bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200 rounded p-1.5">
                    <h4 class="font-bold text-blue-900 mb-1.5 flex items-center gap-1">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-info-circle"></i>
                        Dues Schedule
                    </h4>
                    <ul class="text-blue-800 space-y-0">
                        <li>• Apr 2019 – Dec 31, 2022: ₱50.00/month</li>
                        <li>• Jan 1, 2023 – Present: ₱200.00/month</li>
                    </ul>
                </div>
                <div class="bg-amber-50 border border-amber-200 rounded p-1.5">
                    <h4 class="font-bold text-amber-900 mb-1.5 flex items-center gap-1">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-exclamation-triangle"></i>
                        Important Policy
                    </h4>
                    <p class="text-amber-800 leading-tight text-base md:text-2xl">    
                        New members are only liable to pay their monthly dues one month after the unit acceptance. HOA dues collection effective April 2019 onwards.
                    </p>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="soa-signatories mt-6 pt-5 border-t-3 border-slate-300">
                <div class="signature-grid">
                    <div class="signature-block">
                        <div class="signature-label">Prepared by:</div>

                    ___________________    
                        <div class="signature-name">LAILA E. GALVERO</div>
                        <div class="signature-position">Treasurer</div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <div class="signature-block">
                        <div class="signature-label">Certified Correct by:</div>
                    ___________________
                        <div class="signature-name">KARREN CRISTA C. ABORDO</div>
                        <div class="signature-position">Auditor</div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="signature-block">
                        <div class="signature-label">Approved by:</div>
                        
                    __________________    
                        <div class="signature-name">EFREN P. DE GUZMAN</div>
                        <div class="signature-position">Vice President</div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="signature-block">
                        <div class="signature-label">Noted by:</div>\

                    __________________    
                        <div class="signature-name">AMADOR D. LEDESMA</div>
                        <div class="signature-position">President</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    `;
}

function renderSOA() {
    const member = members.find(m => m.id === currentSOAMemberId);
    if (!member) return;
    
    const soaHTML = `<div class="max-w-4xl mx-auto">${generateSOAHTML(member)}</div>`;
    document.getElementById('soaContent').innerHTML = soaHTML;
}

function renderAllSOAs() {
    if (members.length === 0) return;
    
    const allSOAsHTML = members.map(member => generateSOAHTML(member)).join('');
    document.getElementById('soaContent').innerHTML = `<div class="max-w-4xl mx-auto">${allSOAsHTML}</div>`;
}

document.getElementById('viewYearBtn').onclick = () => {
    soaViewMode = 'year';
    document.getElementById('viewYearBtn').classList.add('bg-white', 'text-slate-900');
    document.getElementById('viewYearBtn').classList.remove('text-white', 'hover:bg-white/10');
    document.getElementById('viewMonthBtn').classList.remove('bg-white', 'text-slate-900');
    document.getElementById('viewMonthBtn').classList.add('text-white', 'hover:bg-white/10');
    if (isPrintingAll) {
        renderAllSOAs();
    } else {
        renderSOA();
    }
};

document.getElementById('viewMonthBtn').onclick = () => {
    soaViewMode = 'month';
    document.getElementById('viewMonthBtn').classList.add('bg-white', 'text-slate-900');
    document.getElementById('viewMonthBtn').classList.remove('text-white', 'hover:bg-white/10');
    document.getElementById('viewYearBtn').classList.remove('bg-white', 'text-slate-900');
    document.getElementById('viewYearBtn').classList.add('text-white', 'hover:bg-white/10');
    if (isPrintingAll) {
        renderAllSOAs();
    } else {
        renderSOA();
    }
};

document.getElementById('printSoaIconBtn').onclick = () => {
    window.print();
};

document.getElementById('downloadSoaBtn').onclick = () => {
    if (!currentSOAMemberId && !isPrintingAll) return;
    
    const element = document.getElementById('soaContent');
    let filename = 'GCHOAI_SOA_';
    
    if (currentSOAMemberId) {
        const member = members.find(m => m.id === currentSOAMemberId);
        if (member) {
            filename += member.name.replace(/[^a-z0-9]/gi, '_') + '_';
        }
    }
    
    filename += new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] + '.pdf';
    
    showDownloadProgress('Generating PDF...');
    
    const opt = {
        margin: [0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5],
        filename: filename,
        image: { type: 'jpeg', quality: 0.98 },
        html2canvas: { 
            scale: 2,
            useCORS: true,
            letterRendering: true
        },
        jsPDF: { unit: 'in', format: 'a4', orientation: 'portrait' }
    };
    
    html2pdf().set(opt).from(element).save().then(() => {
        hideDownloadProgress();
    }).catch(err => {
        hideDownloadProgress();
        alert('Error generating PDF. Please try using the Print button and save as PDF.');
        console.error(err);
    });
};

document.getElementById('downloadAllSoaBtn').onclick = async () => {
    if (members.length === 0) {
        alert('No members to generate SOAs for');
        return;
    }
    
    showDownloadProgress('Preparing all SOAs...');
    
    isPrintingAll = true;
    currentSOAMemberId = null;
    renderAllSOAs();
    
    await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 500));
    
    const element = document.getElementById('soaContent');
    const filename = `GCHOAI_All_SOAs_${new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}.pdf`;
    
    updateDownloadProgress(`Generating PDF for ${members.length} members...`);
    
    const opt = {
        margin: [0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5],
        filename: filename,
        image: { type: 'jpeg', quality: 0.98 },
        html2canvas: { 
            scale: 2,
            useCORS: true,
            letterRendering: true
        },
        jsPDF: { unit: 'in', format: 'a4', orientation: 'portrait' },
        pagebreak: { mode: ['avoid-all', 'css', 'legacy'] }
    };
    
    html2pdf().set(opt).from(element).save().then(() => {
        hideDownloadProgress();
        alert(`Successfully generated PDF with ${members.length} Statement of Accounts`);
    }).catch(err => {
        hideDownloadProgress();
        alert('Error generating PDF. The file may be too large. Try downloading individual SOAs instead.');
        console.error(err);
    });
};

function showDownloadProgress(message) {
    const progress = document.getElementById('downloadProgress');
    document.getElementById('downloadProgressText').textContent = message;
    progress.classList.remove('hidden');
}

function updateDownloadProgress(message) {
    document.getElementById('downloadProgressText').textContent = message;
}

function hideDownloadProgress() {
    document.getElementById('downloadProgress').classList.add('hidden');
}

document.getElementById('closeSoaBtn').onclick = () => {
    document.getElementById('soaModal').classList.add('hidden');
    currentSOAMemberId = null;
    isPrintingAll = false;
};

document.getElementById('printAllSoaBtn').onclick = () => {
    generateAllSOAs();
};

document.getElementById('editAssocBtn').onclick = () => {
    document.getElementById('inputAssocAddress').value = association.address;
    document.getElementById('inputAssocContact').value = association.contact;
    document.getElementById('inputAssocEmail').value = association.email;
    document.getElementById('assocModal').classList.remove('hidden');
};

document.getElementById('cancelAssocBtn').onclick = () => {
    document.getElementById('assocModal').classList.add('hidden');
};

document.getElementById('assocForm').onsubmit = (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    
    association = {
        address: document.getElementById('inputAssocAddress').value,
        contact: document.getElementById('inputAssocContact').value,
        email: document.getElementById('inputAssocEmail').value
    };
    
    saveAssociation();
    renderAssociation();
    document.getElementById('assocModal').classList.add('hidden');
};

document.getElementById('searchInput').oninput = () => {
    renderMembers();
};

document.getElementById('exportBtn').onclick = () => {
    if (members.length === 0) {
        alert('No members to export');
        return;
    }
    
    const headers = ['Name', 'Address', 'Contact', 'Date Joined', 'Dues Start', 'Total Dues', 'Total Amount Paid', 'Balance'];
    const rows = members.map(member => {
        const dues = calculateMemberDues(member);
        return [
            member.name,
            member.address,
            member.contact,
            member.dateJoined,
            formatMonth(dues.actualStartDate),
            roundToTwoDecimals(dues.totalDues),
            roundToTwoDecimals(dues.totalPaid),
            roundToTwoDecimals(dues.balance)
        ];
    });
    
    let csv = headers.join(',') + '\n';
    rows.forEach(row => {
        csv += row.map(field => `"${field}"`).join(',') + '\n';
    });
    
    const blob = new Blob([csv], { type: 'text/csv;charset=utf-8;' });
    const link = document.createElement('a');
    link.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    link.download = `Grand_Cedar_HOA_Dues_${new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}.csv`;
    link.click();
};

document.getElementById('memberModal').onclick = (e) => {
    if (e.target.id === 'memberModal') document.getElementById('memberModal').classList.add('hidden');
};
document.getElementById('paymentModal').onclick = (e) => {
    if (e.target.id === 'paymentModal') document.getElementById('paymentModal').classList.add('hidden');
};
document.getElementById('editPaymentModal').onclick = (e) => {
    if (e.target.id === 'editPaymentModal') document.getElementById('editPaymentModal').classList.add('hidden');
};
document.getElementById('assocModal').onclick = (e) => {
    if (e.target.id === 'assocModal') document.getElementById('assocModal').classList.add('hidden');
};
document.getElementById('soaModal').onclick = (e) => {
    if (e.target.id === 'soaModal') document.getElementById('soaModal').classList.add('hidden');
};

// Init
loadData();
</script>
</body>
</html>
